source: KSS. The Yoga-sūtram by Maharṣi Patañjali with the Yoga-pradipikā Commentary by Pandit Bala-dewa Miśra. Kashi Sanskrit Series Haridas Sanskrit Grantha-mālā) no. 85, 1931. B132 V6 P264 1931; Jhajjar. Ārya-muni. Yogāryya-bhāṣya. Bhāṣya-kartā Aryya-muni; Jhajjara: Harayāṇā Sāhitya Saṃsthāna, Gurukula Jhajjara. 2029. Vi[krama-saṃvat = 1973]. B132 Y6 A73 1973. Pp. 1-16 of the appendix; Vā. Patanjala Darshana of the System of Yoga Philosophy by Maharshi Kapila [!] with the Commentary of Vyasa and the Gloss of Vachaspati Mishra. Edited and published by Pandit Jibananda Vidyasagara. Third edition. Calcutta. Printed at the Bachaspatya Press. 1940; Vivaraṇa: Pātañjala-Yogasūtra-bhāṣya-vivaraṇam of Śaṅkara-bhagavat-pāda. Critically edited with introduction by Polakam Sri Rama Sastri and S. R. Krishnamurthi Sastri. Madras: Government Oriental Manuscripts Library. 1952.
